text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day before the Satsuki Sho, and Narita
Taishin encounters a redheaded girl just as small
as her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin finds herself under a barrage of
comments telling her that no one expects
anything from her or thinks she can win. Then the
girl asks if all of that makes her want to give up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin responds that she won't give up
just because of other people's opinions and that
she'll put everyone to shame with her running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, as if to make good on her words,
Narita Taishin shows up to race with an intensity
that overwhelms her two rivals.
